title: My Money Comes Through Me, Not to Me by Accident
subtitle: An affirmation for placing the source of wealth in consistent effort and identity, not external luck or rescue
excerpt: A brief affirmation for the windfall fantasy. The statement places the source of money in the person saying it, and closes the loop on the waiting pattern.

practice.whenToUse: Use on mornings when the pull toward passive, luck-based money thinking is strong, as a reminder of where the real source of financial change lives.

content.text: A brief affirmation for the windfall fantasy. The statement places the source of money in the person saying it — not in luck, inheritance, or an unlikely external event.
Say it three times, hand on heart. Let each word land before moving to the next.
My money comes through me, not to me by accident.
